title: Connection refused error in AI Agent node with custom LLM API
symptom: When trying to connect to a custom LLM API from the AI Agent node, n8n throws a 'connect ECONNREFUSED' error.
applies_when: Connecting to a custom LLM API on localhost
not_this_if: Running n8n directly on the host machine without Docker
root_cause: Docker containers have their own network stack and cannot access the host's localhost directly. This leads to connection refusals when trying to reach services running on the host machine's localhost.
fix_steps: Change the base URL in the AI Agent node to use the host's IP address instead of 'localhost'
Find the host's IP address (e.g., using 'ipconfig' on Windows)
Update the base URL to 'http://<host-ip>:25187/api/v1' and save the workflow
agent_instruction: Update the base URL to use the host's IP address instead of 'localhost'.
